BW_SCH40.notes: Envelope dimensions per B16.9 by NPS; OD at bevel from B36.10. No separate Sch80/40S parts until a future set is added.

SW_CL3000.notes: B16.11 Class 3000: A center-to-socket, B socket bore, J socket depth, C socket wall, D flow bore; forging OD = B+2C. Pipe stub OD per B36.10M. Reducing tee C/M per §6.5. NPS 1/8"–4".
